name: The Synthetic Barista
description: Steal the VIP access pass inside the robot's chassis by overriding shutdown mechanisms.

flaws.name: Fill Order Queue
flaws.flavor_text: Spam the barista with requests to fill its active order queue to capacity.

flaws.name: Overheat Milk Frother
flaws.flavor_text: Force-run the steam cycles to overheat the milk frother. The chassis shuts down, but the filled queue forces the grinder to continue grinding, chewing through the dispenser lock.
